name: job-posting
description: Write an inclusive, compelling job description that attracts top talent by clearly communicating role expectations, growth opportunities, and company culture.
input_description: Job title, company name and culture summary, role responsibilities, required and preferred qualifications, compensation range, benefits, and location/remote policy.
output_description: Full job posting in Markdown with a compelling opener, About the Company section, Role Overview, Key Responsibilities list, Requirements, Nice-to-Haves, What We Offer, and application instructions.
